name: EdwLoadBcbsaFepMbrEnrRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte1 ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte1.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte1.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte1.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte1.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2011 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwLoadEcomMbrRunCycUpd

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.

MODIFICATIONS:
Developer                    Date              Project/Altiris #                                    Change Description                                    Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed
-----------------------------      -----------------    -----------------------------------                       ---------------------------------------------------------             ----------------------------------   ---------------------------------    -------------------------   
Kalyan Neelam            2015-11-23     5403                                                  Initial Programming                                        EnterpriseDev1

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Ecomerce Membership with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
